subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter which was penned in refutation of the calumnies of the people of most holy Najaf hath surely [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوبی که در مدافعه بر مفتریات اهل نجف اشرف مرقوم شده البته
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @review of publications, @newspapers and the media; publications
